title: Document hierarchical ID collisions and Taskulus approach
description: Update architecture docs to explain why Beads-style hierarchical IDs (e.g., tskl-0lb.1) collide when multiple agents create children concurrently, and how Taskulus uses flat hash IDs plus parent pointers instead. Include the tskl-0lb child list example and note that hierarchy should be rendered, not encoded in IDs.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: 1) Architecture page updated with explanation of hierarchical ID collision risk and Taskulus solution. 2) Example using tskl-0lb child IDs included. 3) Guidance: use flat IDs + parent field; render hierarchy in CLI/docs.
